prompt: Create a wide 16:9 anime classroom illustration of a Japanese schoolgirl standing at the right side in front of a large dark green chalkboard. The girl is a half-body/three-quarter view character wearing a navy sailor-style school uniform with a white long-sleeve blouse, striped sailor collar, dark vest, pleated skirt, and a large burgundy red bow at the chest. She has short chin-length dark brown bob hair with soft highlights and bangs, leaning forward slightly with her hands clasped behind her back; her face is intentionally obscured by a vertical blurred rectangular censor block so facial details are not visible. On the left side of the chalkboard, write large white chalk Japanese text exactly: 「日本語の\n描画能力は\nこんなもん」. Make the lettering look hand-drawn with chalk texture, thick strokes, slightly imperfect edges, and three stacked lines. Include chalkboard smudges, erased marks, subtle dust, a metal chalk tray along the bottom, and exactly 4 visible erasers/chalk-tray objects: one tan eraser partly visible at the far lower left, one long tan chalkboard eraser near the lower center, one small pale chalk stick/tray item near the center, and one blue eraser with an orange top near the girl. Use soft cinematic classroom lighting from the upper right, gentle depth of field, detailed anime rendering, painterly background, muted green and gray tones, no extra characters, no watermark, and keep the composition balanced with text dominating the left two-thirds and the student occupying the right third.
